PRIME.description: Atomic host-native or kernel-primitive operations used as the smallest bounded units.

SKILL.description: Discrete host-native capabilities that may invoke bounded kernel primitives when the registry allows it.

WEAVE.description: Host-native workflow compositions that weave multiple skills/primes into a larger effect while the kernel catalogs and dispatches them.

SPELL.description: Host-native recursive policies and workflow loops over skills/weaves; not a Node-runtime ownership tier.

hall.description: Use when searching the Hall of Records, retrieving repository status, or querying metadata.

mimir.description: Use when querying the Well of Mimir for deep semantic search.

vitals.description: Retrieve system health metrics, resource usage, or agentic mission status.

status.description: Retrieve system vitals, framework state, and estate matrix reports.

metrics.description: Compute project health metrics from latency, complexity, linting, and neural alignment.

scan.description: Perform structural repository scans, extract symbols, and update the Gungnir matrix.

manifest.description: List registered Agent Skills, Weaves, or inspect specific skill mandates.

qmd_search.description: Search PennyOne QMD reports across Gungnir vectors.

oracle.description: Consult the One Mind Host Agent via direct sampling for reasoning or intent generation.

calculus.description: Score code artifacts across logic, style, symmetry, and semantic intelligence.

trace.description: The Neural Selection Gate. Analyzes prompts via the One Mind to select the optimal tier (Skill, Weave, Spell).

style.description: Orchestrate neural search and proactive skill discovery through the sovereign search engine.

agent-browser.description: High-performance browser automation CLI for AI agents.

agentic-ingest.description: Direct One Mind conduit for recording file intelligence into the Hall of Records.

forge.description: Translate lore fragments into staged code artifacts through the Artifact Forge pipeline.

scribe.description: Record runtime observations as Hall-backed feedback.

report.description: Generate persona-aware reports with enforced voice and integrity signatures.

jailing.description: Execute untrusted skills inside restricted Docker sandboxes with cleanups.

gatekeeper.description: Enforcer of Gungnir Law. Manages filesystem locks and Git hooks.

locks.description: Manage exclusive task leases in PennyOne to prevent deadlocks.

manuscript-optimizer.description: The Karpathy Auto-Researcher Loop for high-fidelity narrative optimization.

annex.description: Audit the repository for structural weaknesses and create annexation plans.

autobot.description: Execute sovereign beads as an ephemeral worker with checker-gated retries.

bookmark-weaver.description: Autonomous ingest of bookmarks into the Hall Bead Ledger.

cachebro.description: Manage intelligent caching strategies for APIs and computations.

chant.description: Parse natural-language chants into executable skill flight paths and routing plans.

chronicle.description: Build high-fidelity system state maps from docs, code, and contracts.

distill.description: Summarize tasks or git diffs into tactical summaries for episodic memory.

consciousness.description: Maintain Totem and Dream state for project identity and proactive intent.

corvus-control.description: Orchestrates the CStar framework and Model Context Protocol (MCP) interactions.

edda.description: Convert legacy Markdown to Quarto or synthesize API reference docs.

empire.description: Verify code artifacts against Gherkin contracts under the Empire TDD protocol.

engine.description: The Core CStar Kernel. Manages the execution spine and runtime dispatcher.

evolve.description: Run the bead-driven optimization loop under runtime and validation authority.

gherkin.description: Create, validate, or manage Gherkin .feature contract files.

hunt.description: Find missing capabilities, evaluate external skills safely, and ingest them.

linter.description: Check prompt integrity between .prompty files and their invocations.

matrix.description: Compile or visualize the repository relationship graph for topographical analysis.

bifrost.description: Manage the Model Context Protocol (MCP) bridge for host agents.

norn.description: Synchronize tasks into the PennyOne ledger and coordinate bead flow.

one-mind.description: Route grounded LLM requests for context anchoring and synthesis.

orchestrate.description: Initiate autonomous restoration cycles and manage the swarm execution loop.

personas.description: Manage persona selection, voice enforcement, and policy checks.

promotion.description: Register, hash, verify, and track promoted skills before admission.

ravens.description: Coordinate autonomous repository improvement by selecting debt targets.

research.description: Use when running fixed-budget experiments against immutable targets and recording successful optimizations into behavioral contracts.

redactor.description: Mask secrets in logs, reports, and terminal output before data leaves.

critique.description: Adversarially stress-test a proposed bead or architecture path against current Hall truth.

ritual.description: Generate lore-accurate terminal animations and ceremonial visual flair.

spoke.description: Manage the Corvus Star estate, linking external repositories.

sprt.description: Run sequential probability ratio tests to judge stability and regressions.

stability.description: Track edit fatigue and oscillation to prevent recursive repair loops.

start.description: Awaken the system pulse, initiate agent loops, and bootstrap the runtime.

sterling.description: Audit repository sectors for compliance with the Sterling mandate.

taliesin.description: The Bard of the Sector. Analyzes writing style and generates high-fidelity narrative, editorial, or social content through an interactive Q&A process and the Phoenix Loop.

taste-skill.description: Craft deliberate frontend interfaces with strong typography and anti-slop rules.

telemetry.description: Record mission telemetry, flares, and broadcast runtime alerts.

visual-explainer.description: Generate self-contained HTML pages for diagrams and project recaps.

warden.description: Monitor repository anomalies, lore violations, and system drift.

restoration.description: Autonomous repair of Linscott breaches from the Hall of Records.

expansion.description: Onboard and topology-scan new Spoke repositories.

vigilance.description: Continuously audit the estate against Gungnir standards.

creation_loop.description: Build new features through chant, forge, and evolve cycles.

contract_hardening.description: Enforce Sterling Compliance across Gherkin layers.

living_architecture.description: Record and analyze architectural decisions back to Mimir's Well.

estate-ritual.description: Execute the daily maintenance ritual (Update, Ingest, Swarm).

secure_speculation.description: Safely theorize and run bounded tests against legacy sectors.

shattering_strike.description: Recursively decompose logic that falls below 4.0 Gungnir score.

phoenix_loop.description: Self-healing loop that recasts weaves upon test failure.

silver_shield.description: Auto-sanitize sectors where the Style score drops below 6.0.

living_well.description: Omniscient post-commit scan to keep the Gungnir matrix updated.

taliesin-optimizer.description: The Karpathy Auto-Researcher Loop. Systematically improves Fallows Hallow manuscript across Writing, Entertainment, Plot, and Coherence axes, maintaining a 90% fidelity floor.

taliesin-story-forge.description: Materialize high-fidelity manuscript chapters using the Phoenix Loop and Karpathy-hardened style instructions.

engrave.description: Convert ephemeral .agents/memory/session_*.json files into structured Engram nodes.
